query:
SELECT rp.id, rp.categoryId, rp.feedItemId, rp.qtyPerHeadPerDay, rp.effectiveDate, rp.endDate, rp.isActive,
       fi.name as feedName,
       (SELECT fph.pricePerUnit FROM feed_item_price_history fph WHERE fph.feedItemId = fi.id ORDER BY fph.effectiveDate DESC LIMIT 1) as latestPrice
FROM ration_plans rp
JOIN feed_items fi ON fi.id = rp.feedItemId
WHERE rp.categoryId = 2 AND rp.deletedAt IS NULL;
